message:
refactor(mcp): isolate fastmcp imports behind per-module framework aliases (ft-181uk)

Replace glob `use fastmcp::*` and `use fastmcp::prelude::*` imports
with explicit local framework modules in mcp.rs, mcp_bridge.rs,
mcp_client.rs, mcp_middleware.rs, and mcp_proxy.rs. Each file now
wraps fastmcp types in a `mod mcp_*_framework` shim with
`pub(crate) use fastmcp::X as FrameworkX` aliases, then re-exports
with short names locally. This hides the upstream crate boundary
behind a module seam, enabling clean substitution when migrating
to the asupersync runtime path. mcp_bridge.rs replaces `use super::*`
with an explicit import list of only the names it actually uses.

Update mcp_proxy_integration.rs to use the same mcp_test_framework
indirection pattern for test helpers.

No behavioral changes — purely an import isolation refactor.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
